metadata.description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: ios-engineer
plugins.description: iOS development tools with visual feedback via iOS Simulator MCP integration

plugins.name: spec-workflow
plugins.description: Spec-driven development workflow: explore ideas, write specs, review with AI personas, and execute implementations

plugins.name: rebase-main
plugins.description: Rebases the current branch onto the latest default branch, automatically resolving merge conflicts

plugins.name: pr-review-handler
plugins.description: Processes PR review comments by assessing feedback, planning actions, implementing changes, and responding to reviewers
